# Field

Form field component with dual functionality: automatic wrapper for form inputs with labels/hints/errors, and direct access to Chakra UI Field sub-components.

## Purpose

The Field component serves two purposes:

1. **Smart Wrapper** - Automatically wraps form inputs with Field.Root when labels, helper text, or error text are provided (used internally by Input, Textarea, Select)
2. **Direct Access** - Provides direct access to Chakra UI Field sub-components (Field.Root, Field.Label, etc.) for custom form layouts

## Features

- Automatic field wrapping for form inputs
- Eliminates code duplication across form components
- Type-safe with FieldWrapperProps
- Direct access to Field.Root, Field.Label, Field.HelperText, Field.ErrorText, Field.RequiredIndicator
- Single source of truth for field-related props

## Import

```tsx
import { Field } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Usage

### As Smart Wrapper (Internal Use)

**Used internally by:**
- Input component
- Textarea component
- Select component

```tsx
import { Field, type FieldWrapperProps } from "../Field";

const MyFormComponent = ({ label, helperText, errorText, invalid, ...props }) => {
  const inputElement = <SomeInput {...props} />;

  return (
    <Field
      label={label}
      helperText={helperText}
      errorText={errorText}
      invalid={invalid}
      required={required}
      disabled={disabled}
      readOnly={readOnly}
    >
      {inputElement}
    </Field>
  );
};
```

### As Direct Field Components

```tsx
import { Field } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

function CustomForm() {
  return (
    <Field.Root>
      <Field.Label>Email Address</Field.Label>
      <input type="email" />
      <Field.HelperText>We'll never share your email.</Field.HelperText>
    </Field.Root>
  );
}
```

### With Error State

```tsx
<Field.Root invalid>
  <Field.Label>Password</Field.Label>
  <input type="password" />
  <Field.ErrorText>Password is required</Field.ErrorText>
</Field.Root>
```

## Props

### Field (Smart Wrapper)

| Prop         | Type            | Default | Description                                        |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| label        | React.ReactNode | -       | Optional label to display above the input          |
| helperText   | React.ReactNode | -       | Optional helper text (shown when not invalid)      |
| errorText    | React.ReactNode | -       | Optional error text (shown when invalid)           |
| invalid      | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is in an invalid state           |
| required     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is required                      |
| disabled     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is disabled                      |
| readOnly     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is read-only                     |
| children     | React.ReactNode | -       | **Required** - The input element to wrap           |

### Field.Root

All props from Chakra UI Field.Root component.

| Prop         | Type            | Default | Description                                        |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| invalid      | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is in an invalid state           |
| required     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is required                      |
| disabled     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is disabled                      |
| readOnly     | boolean         | false   | Whether the field is read-only                     |

### Field.Label

All props from Chakra UI Field.Label component.

| Prop         | Type            | Default | Description                                        |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| children     | React.ReactNode | -       | Label text                                         |

### Field.HelperText

All props from Chakra UI Field.HelperText component.

| Prop         | Type            | Default | Description                                        |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| children     | React.ReactNode | -       | Helper text content                                |

### Field.ErrorText

All props from Chakra UI Field.ErrorText component.

| Prop         | Type            | Default | Description                                        |
| ------------ | --------------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| children     | React.ReactNode | -       | Error message content                              |

### Field.RequiredIndicator

All props from Chakra UI Field.RequiredIndicator component.

## Behavior

**Smart Wrapper Mode:**

1. **When label, helperText, or errorText are provided:**
   - Wraps children in Field.Root
   - Renders Field.Label if label is provided
   - Renders children (the input element)
   - Renders Field.HelperText if helperText is provided and field is not invalid
   - Renders Field.ErrorText if errorText is provided and field is invalid

2. **When none of label, helperText, or errorText are provided:**
   - Returns children directly without wrapping

**Direct Component Mode:**

Use Field.Root, Field.Label, etc. directly for complete control over form field layout.

## Examples

### Smart Wrapper (Used by Input)

**Before (duplicated in each component):**
```tsx
const Input = ({ label, helperText, errorText, invalid, ...props }) => {
  if (label || helperText || errorText) {
    return (
      <Field.Root invalid={invalid} required={required}>
        {label && <Field.Label>{label}</Field.Label>}
        <ChakraInput {...props} />
        {helperText && !invalid && <Field.HelperText>{helperText}</Field.HelperText>}
        {errorText && invalid && <Field.ErrorText>{errorText}</Field.ErrorText>}
      </Field.Root>
    );
  }
  return <ChakraInput {...props} />;
};
```

**After (using Field):**
```tsx
const Input = ({ label, helperText, errorText, invalid, ...props }) => {
  const inputElement = <ChakraInput {...props} />;

  return (
    <Field
      label={label}
      helperText={helperText}
      errorText={errorText}
      invalid={invalid}
      required={required}
      disabled={disabled}
      readOnly={readOnly}
    >
      {inputElement}
    </Field>
  );
};
```

### Custom Form with Direct Components

```tsx
<form>
  <Field.Root required>
    <Field.Label>Username</Field.Label>
    <input type="text" />
    <Field.RequiredIndicator />
  </Field.Root>

  <Field.Root invalid>
    <Field.Label>Email</Field.Label>
    <input type="email" />
    <Field.ErrorText>Invalid email format</Field.ErrorText>
  </Field.Root>

  <Field.Root>
    <Field.Label>Bio</Field.Label>
    <textarea />
    <Field.HelperText>Tell us about yourself</Field.HelperText>
  </Field.Root>
</form>
```

## TypeScript Support

Full TypeScript support with exported types:

```typescript
import {
  Field,
  type FieldProps,
  type FieldWrapperProps,
  type FieldRootProps,
  type FieldLabelProps,
  type FieldHelperTextProps,
  type FieldErrorTextProps,
  type FieldRequiredIndicatorProps,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Use FieldWrapperProps for form input components
interface InputProps extends InputBaseProps, Omit<FieldWrapperProps, "children"> {}
```

## Notes

- Field is both a smart wrapper and a namespace for sub-components
- Use the smart wrapper mode (just `<Field>`) in form input components like Input, Textarea, Select
- Use the direct components (`Field.Root`, `Field.Label`, etc.) when building custom forms
- The component maintains full TypeScript type safety with all props properly typed
- FieldWrapperProps is the recommended type for extending field-related props
